chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Ruling for One Whose Circumambulation is Interrupted by Prayer or Other Matters

text: 2793 - رَوَى يُونُسُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ قَالَ : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ رَأَيْتُ فِي ثَوْبِي شَيْئاً مِنْ دَمٍ وَ أَنَا أَطُوفُ قَالَ «فَاعْرِفِ اَلْمَوْضِعَ ثُمَّ اُخْرُجْ فَاغْسِلْهُ ثُمَّ عُدْ فَابْنِ عَلَى طَوَافِكَ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2793 - Yunus ibn Ya‘qub narrated: I said to Abu Abdullah (as), "I noticed some blood on my clothing while I was performing tawaf."
Imam (as) said: "Mark the spot where you stopped, then exit, wash it off, and return to continue your tawaf from where you left off."
